title: Embed Live365 player iframe in OnAirNow component

requirements.text: Embed the Live365 iframe player (`<iframe width="450" height="316" frameborder="0" src="https://live365.com/embeds/v1/player/a57949?s=md&m=dark&c=mp3"></iframe>`) inside the `OnAirNow` component (`frontend/src/components/OnAirNow.tsx`), positioned prominently within the section. The iframe must be responsive — wrap it in a container that caps its max width and centers it horizontally so it fits well on both mobile and desktop layouts while preserving the existing country theme styling around it.

quotes: add <iframe width="450" height="316" frameborder="0" src="https://live365.com/embeds/v1/player/a57949?s=md&m=dark&c=mp3"></iframe> to now playing section

acceptanceCriteria: The Live365 player iframe with src `https://live365.com/embeds/v1/player/a57949?s=md&m=dark&c=mp3` is rendered inside `frontend/src/components/OnAirNow.tsx`.
The iframe is wrapped in a responsive container with a max-width cap (e.g. max-w-[450px]) and centered horizontally.
On mobile viewports the player does not overflow or cause horizontal scrolling.
The existing country theme styling (warm earthy tones, serif headings, ON AIR badge, show info) is preserved around the player.
The player is positioned prominently and visibly within the OnAirNow section.

nonGoals: Changing the RecentlyPlayed component or the Ways to Listen section.
Altering the Navigation bar or Home page layout.
